---
title: "Part 2：优化算法"
author: Brench
date: 2026-07-08
date-modified: today
page-layout: full
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - "../chapter04-optimization-algorithms/*.qmd"
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part2-optimization-algorithms
  description: "Part 2: 优化算法"
---
